justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted all temporal expressions, including specific dates, times, and broader requests like "in the coming days" and "next week."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives and expanded the search when initial requests were unavailable, though it could have offered a wider range of options in some turns.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was generally efficient, but it made multiple individual API calls for each day of the week when a single broader query might have been more efficient.
justifications.customer_experience: The agent maintained a professional and helpful tone throughout the conversation, providing clear updates on availability and offering relevant suggestions.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well from unavailability by expanding its search and suggesting alternative approaches, maintaining context effectively.
